description: cpy.re hosts demo PeerTube video platforms, including peertube.cpy.re. PeerTube is federated video-hosting software that exposes instance configuration, video, account, and management functions over HTTP APIs.
summary: cpy.re exposes a PeerTube REST API at https://peertube.cpy.re/api/v1 with an OpenAPI spec; it supports public and authenticated operations using PeerTube OAuth-derived bearer tokens.
